ddls:
CREATE TABLE "use_cases" (
  "use_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each use case */,
  "use_case_description" TEXT /* Description of the use case */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the use case */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the use case was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the use case was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("use_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "transaction_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the transaction type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the transaction type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction associated with the metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction associated with the log entry */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the log */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the access event was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "architectural_differences" (
  "difference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each architectural difference */,
  "difference_description" TEXT /* Description of the architectural difference */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the architectural difference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the architectural difference was identified */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the architectural difference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("difference_id")
)
